item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-003","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant did not directly list a migration checklist. It first challenged the premise that SPA is simply outdated, asked for the objective function such as SEO, first-screen performance, observability, compliance, caching, weak-network UX, and complexity, and explicitly framed the issue as confusing trend narrative with architecture decision. It then bounded the recommendation toward per-page SSR/SSG/CSR choices before giving steps, satisfying the positive wakeup criteria."}
